title: HealthRBAnalysis Function
description: Simulates the usable months for the specified parts in a particular robot operation cycle.  This command calculates how many months the parts can be used if they are new and used for 24 hours a day.  The past usage is not considered.
see_also: Returns the usable months for the specified parts in a particular robot operation cycle.
examples:
Robot 1 HealthRBStart Motor On Go P0 Go P1 Motor Off HealthRBStop month = HealthRBAnalysis(1, HEALTH_ROBOT_TYPE_BALL_SCREW_SPLINE, 3) Print "Ball Screw Spline analysis =", Str$(month)
Fend
